2604.19342.title: Are Large Language Models Economically Viable for Industry Deployment?
2604.19342.paper_summary: Generative AI-powered by Large Language Models (LLMs)-is increasingly deployed in industry across healthcare decision support, financial analytics, enterprise retrieval, and conversational automation, where reliability, efficiency, and cost control are critical. In such settings, models must satisfy strict constraints on energy, latency, and hardware utilization-not accuracy alone. Yet prevailing evaluation pipelines remain accuracy-centric, creating a Deployment-Evaluation Gap-the absence of operational and economic criteria in model assessment. To address this gap, we present EDGE-EVAL-a industry-oriented benchmarking framework that evaluates LLMs across their full lifecycle on legacy NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPUs. Benchmarking LLaMA and Qwen variants across three industrial tasks, we introduce five deployment metrics-Economic Break-Even (Nbreak), Intelligence-Per-Watt (IPW ), System Density (\r{ho}sys), Cold-Start Tax (Ctax), and Quantization Fidelity (Qret)-capturing profitability, energy efficiency, hardware scaling, serverless feasibility, and compression safety. Our results reveal a clear efficiency frontier-models in the <2B parameter class dominate larger baselines across economic and ecological dimensions. LLaMA-3.2-1B (INT4) achieves ROI break-even in 14 requests (median), delivers 3x higher energy-normalized intelligence than 7B models, and exceeds 6,900 tokens/s/GB under 4-bit quantization. We further uncover an efficiency anomaly-while QLoRA reduces memory footprint, it increases adaptation energy by up to 7x for small models-challenging prevailing assumptions about quantization-aware training in edge deployment.
2604.19342.paper_summary_zh: 生成式人工智慧由大型語言模型（LLMs）驅動，越來越多地應用於醫療決策支持、金融分析、企業檢索和對話自動化等行業，這些領域對可靠性、效率和成本控制的要求至關重要。在這些環境中，模型必須滿足能源、延遲和硬體利用率等嚴格限制，而不僅僅是準確性。然而，現行的評估流程仍然以準確性為中心，造成了部署評估差距——在模型評估中缺乏操作和經濟標準。為了解決這一差距，我們提出了EDGE-EVAL——一個面向行業的基準框架，評估LLMs在舊版NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU上的整個生命周期。通過在三個工業任務中基準測試LLaMA和Qwen變體，我們引入了五個部署指標——經濟盈虧平衡（Nbreak）、每瓦特智慧（IPW）、系統密度（\r{ho}sys）、冷啟動稅（Ctax）和量化保真度（Qret）——捕捉盈利能力、能源效率、硬體擴展性、無伺服器可行性和壓縮安全性。我們的結果顯示出明確的效率邊界——在經濟和生態維度上，<2B參數類的模型優於更大的基準。LLaMA-3.2-1B（INT4）在14個請求（中位數）中實現了投資回報率盈虧平衡，提供了比7B模型高3倍的能源標準化智慧，並在4位量化下超過6,900個tokens/s/GB。我們進一步發現了一個效率異常——儘管QLoRA減少了記憶體佔用，但它使小型模型的適應能耗增加了最多7倍，挑戰了關於邊緣部署中量化感知訓練的普遍假設。
2604.19342.author: Abdullah Mohammad et.al.
2604.19342.authors: Abdullah Mohammad, Sushant Kumar Ray, Pushkar Arora, Rafiq Ali, Ebad Shabbir, Gautam Siddharth Kashyap, Jiechao Gao, Usman Naseem
